queries.question: Which city uses asphalt runways?
queries.sql:
Select City.name, City.country
FROM City
JOIN Airport on City.id = Airport.city_id
JOIN Runway on Airport.id = Runway.airport_id
WHERE Runway.surface_type = "Asphalt"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?country WHERE {
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCity ?city .
  ?runway a :Runways .
  ?runway p:hasAirport ?airport .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?city p:country ?country .
  ?runway p:surface_type ?surface_type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?surface_type_f) = "Asphalt")
}

queries.question: Tell me city and coordinates of Emirates headquarter.
queries.sql:
Select City.name, City.country, Coordinates.latitude, Coordinates.longitude
FROM Coordinates
JOIN Airport on Coordinates.id = Airport.coordinates_id JOIN City ON City.id = Airport.city_id JOIN Airline on City.id = Airline.headquarter_city_id
WHERE Airline.name = "Emirates"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?country ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?coordinates a :Coordinates .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCoordinates ?coordinates .
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?airport p:hasCity ?city .
  ?airline a :Airlines .
  ?airline p:hasCity ?city .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?city p:country ?country .
  ?coordinates p:latitude ?latitude .
  ?coordinates p:longitude ?longitude .
  ?airline p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Emirates")
}

queries.question: Give me the cities where paved runways are used and their coordinates.
queries.sql:
Select City.name, City.country, Coordinates.latitude, Coordinates.longitude
FROM City
JOIN Airport on City.id = Airport.city_id JOIN Coordinates on Coordinates.id = Airport.coordinates_id
JOIN Runway on Airport.id = Runway.airport_id
WHERE Runway.surface_type = "Asphalt"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?country ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCity ?city .
  ?coordinates a :Coordinates .
  ?airport p:hasCoordinates ?coordinates .
  ?runway a :Runways .
  ?runway p:hasAirport ?airport .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?city p:country ?country .
  ?coordinates p:latitude ?latitude .
  ?coordinates p:longitude ?longitude .
  ?runway p:surface_type ?surface_type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?surface_type_f) = "Asphalt")
}

queries.question: Give me the coordinates of a place where paved runways are used.
queries.sql:
Select Coordinates.latitude, Coordinates.longitude
FROM Coordinates
JOIN Airport on Coordinates.id = Airport.coordinates_id
JOIN Runway on Airport.id = Runway.airport_id
WHERE Runway.surface_type = "Asphalt"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?coordinates a :Coordinates .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCoordinates ?coordinates .
  ?runway a :Runways .
  ?runway p:hasAirport ?airport .
  ?coordinates p:latitude ?latitude .
  ?coordinates p:longitude ?longitude .
  ?runway p:surface_type ?surface_type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?surface_type_f) = "Asphalt")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Where are asphalt runways used?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?country WHERE {
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCity ?city .
  ?runway a :Runways .
  ?runway p:hasAirport ?airport .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?city p:country ?country .
  ?runway p:surface_type ?surface_type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?surface_type_f) = "Asphalt")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?country ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?city a :Cities .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCity ?city .
  ?coordinates a :Coordinates .
  ?airport p:hasCoordinates ?coordinates .
  ?runway a :Runways .
  ?runway p:hasAirport ?airport .
  ?city p:name ?name .
  ?city p:country ?country .
  ?coordinates p:latitude ?latitude .
  ?coordinates p:longitude ?longitude .
  ?runway p:surface_type ?surface_type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?surface_type_f) = "Asphalt")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?coordinates a :Coordinates .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?airport p:hasCoordinates ?coordinates .
  ?runway a :Runways .
  ?runway p:hasAirport ?airport .
  ?coordinates p:latitude ?latitude .
  ?coordinates p:longitude ?longitude .
  ?runway p:surface_type ?surface_type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?surface_type_f) = "Asphalt")
} }
}
